name: Padded Armor
description: AC 11 + Dex modifier. Stealth: Disadvantage. Padded armor consists of quilted layers of cloth and batting. (Light Armor — 1 Minute to Don or Doff)

name: Leather Armor
description: AC 11 + Dex modifier. The breastplate and shoulder protectors of this armor are made of leather that has been stiffened by being boiled in oil. The rest of the armor is made of softer and more flexible materials. (Light Armor — 1 Minute to Don or Doff)

name: Studded Leather Armor
description: AC 12 + Dex modifier. Made from tough but flexible leather, studded leather is reinforced with close-set rivets or spikes. (Light Armor — 1 Minute to Don or Doff)

name: Hide Armor
description: AC 12 + Dex modifier (max 2). This crude armor consists of thick furs and pelts. It is commonly worn by barbarian tribes, evil humanoids, and other folk who lack access to the tools and materials needed to create better armor. (Medium Armor — 5 Minutes to Don, 1 Minute to Doff)

name: Chain Shirt
description: AC 13 + Dex modifier (max 2). Made of interlocking metal rings, a chain shirt is worn between layers of clothing or leather. This armor offers modest protection to the wearer's upper body and allows the sound of the rings rubbing against one another to be muffled by outer layers. (Medium Armor — 5 Minutes to Don, 1 Minute to Doff)

name: Scale Mail
description: AC 14 + Dex modifier (max 2). Stealth: Disadvantage. This armor consists of a coat and leggings (and perhaps a separate skirt) of leather covered with overlapping pieces of metal, much like the scales of a fish. The suit includes gauntlets. (Medium Armor — 5 Minutes to Don, 1 Minute to Doff)

name: Breastplate
description: AC 14 + Dex modifier (max 2). This armor consists of a fitted metal chest piece worn with supple leather. Although it leaves the legs and arms relatively unprotected, this armor provides good protection for the wearer's vital organs while leaving the wearer relatively unencumbered. (Medium Armor — 5 Minutes to Don, 1 Minute to Doff)

name: Half Plate Armor
description: AC 15 + Dex modifier (max 2). Stealth: Disadvantage. Half plate consists of shaped metal plates that cover most of the wearer's body. It does not include leg protection beyond simple greaves that are attached with leather straps. (Medium Armor — 5 Minutes to Don, 1 Minute to Doff)

name: Ring Mail
description: AC 14. Stealth: Disadvantage. This armor is leather armor with heavy rings sewn into it. The rings help reinforce the armor against blows from swords and axes. Ring mail is inferior to chain mail, and it's usually worn only by those who can't afford better armor. (Heavy Armor — 10 Minutes to Don, 5 Minutes to Doff)

name: Chain Mail
description: AC 16. Strength: 13. Stealth: Disadvantage. Made of interlocking metal rings, chain mail includes a layer of quilted fabric worn underneath the mail to prevent chafing and to cushion the impact of blows. The suit includes gauntlets. (Heavy Armor — 10 Minutes to Don, 5 Minutes to Doff)

name: Splint Armor
description: AC 17. Strength: 15. Stealth: Disadvantage. This armor is made of narrow vertical strips of metal riveted to a backing of leather that is worn over cloth padding. Flexible chain mail protects the joints. (Heavy Armor — 10 Minutes to Don, 5 Minutes to Doff)

name: Plate Armor
description: AC 18. Strength: 15. Stealth: Disadvantage. Plate consists of shaped, interlocking metal plates to cover the entire body. A suit of plate includes gauntlets, heavy leather boots, a visored helmet, and thick layers of padding underneath the armor. Buckles and straps distribute the weight over the body. (Heavy Armor — 10 Minutes to Don, 5 Minutes to Doff)

name: Shield
description: AC +2. A shield is made from wood or metal and is carried in one hand. Wielding a shield increases your Armor Class by 2. You can benefit from only one shield at a time. (Utilize Action to Don or Doff)

name: Club
description: 1d4 Bludgeoning. Properties: Light. Mastery: Slow. Weight: 2 lb. (Simple Melee Weapon)

name: Dagger
description: 1d4 Piercing. Properties: Finesse, Light, Thrown (Range 20/60). Mastery: Nick. Weight: 1 lb. (Simple Melee Weapon)

name: Greatclub
description: 1d8 Bludgeoning. Properties: Two-Handed. Mastery: Push. Weight: 10 lb. (Simple Melee Weapon)

name: Handaxe
description: 1d6 Slashing. Properties: Light, Thrown (Range 20/60). Mastery: Vex. Weight: 2 lb. (Simple Melee Weapon)

name: Javelin
description: 1d6 Piercing. Properties: Thrown (Range 30/120). Mastery: Slow. Weight: 2 lb. (Simple Melee Weapon)

name: Light Hammer
description: 1d4 Bludgeoning. Properties: Light, Thrown (Range 20/60). Mastery: Nick. Weight: 2 lb. (Simple Melee Weapon)

name: Mace
description: 1d6 Bludgeoning. Mastery: Sap. Weight: 4 lb. (Simple Melee Weapon)

name: Quarterstaff
description: 1d6 Bludgeoning. Properties: Versatile (1d8). Mastery: Topple. Weight: 4 lb. (Simple Melee Weapon)

name: Sickle
description: 1d4 Slashing. Properties: Light. Mastery: Nick. Weight: 2 lb. (Simple Melee Weapon)

name: Spear
description: 1d6 Piercing. Properties: Thrown (Range 20/60), Versatile (1d8). Mastery: Sap. Weight: 3 lb. (Simple Melee Weapon)

name: Dart
description: 1d4 Piercing. Properties: Finesse, Thrown (Range 20/60). Mastery: Vex. Weight: 1/4 lb. (Simple Ranged Weapon)

name: Light Crossbow
description: 1d8 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 80/320; Bolt), Loading, Two-Handed. Mastery: Slow. Weight: 5 lb. (Simple Ranged Weapon)

name: Shortbow
description: 1d6 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 80/320; Arrow), Two-Handed. Mastery: Vex. Weight: 2 lb. (Simple Ranged Weapon)

name: Sling
description: 1d4 Bludgeoning. Properties: Ammunition (Range 30/120; Bullet). Mastery: Slow. (Simple Ranged Weapon)

name: Battleaxe
description: 1d8 Slashing. Properties: Versatile (1d10). Mastery: Topple. Weight: 4 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Flail
description: 1d8 Bludgeoning. Mastery: Sap. Weight: 2 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Glaive
description: 1d10 Slashing. Properties: Heavy, Reach, Two-Handed. Mastery: Graze. Weight: 6 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Greataxe
description: 1d12 Slashing. Properties: Heavy, Two-Handed. Mastery: Cleave. Weight: 7 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Greatsword
description: 2d6 Slashing. Properties: Heavy, Two-Handed. Mastery: Graze. Weight: 6 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Halberd
description: 1d10 Slashing. Properties: Heavy, Reach, Two-Handed. Mastery: Cleave. Weight: 6 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Lance
description: 1d10 Piercing. Properties: Heavy, Reach, Two-Handed (unless mounted). Mastery: Topple. Weight: 6 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Longsword
description: 1d8 Slashing. Properties: Versatile (1d10). Mastery: Sap. Weight: 3 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Maul
description: 2d6 Bludgeoning. Properties: Heavy, Two-Handed. Mastery: Topple. Weight: 10 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Morningstar
description: 1d8 Piercing. Mastery: Sap. Weight: 4 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Pike
description: 1d10 Piercing. Properties: Heavy, Reach, Two-Handed. Mastery: Push. Weight: 18 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Rapier
description: 1d8 Piercing. Properties: Finesse. Mastery: Vex. Weight: 2 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Scimitar
description: 1d6 Slashing. Properties: Finesse, Light. Mastery: Nick. Weight: 3 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Shortsword
description: 1d6 Piercing. Properties: Finesse, Light. Mastery: Vex. Weight: 2 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Trident
description: 1d8 Piercing. Properties: Thrown (Range 20/60), Versatile (1d10). Mastery: Topple. Weight: 4 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: War Pick
description: 1d8 Piercing. Properties: Versatile (1d10). Mastery: Sap. Weight: 2 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Warhammer
description: 1d8 Bludgeoning. Properties: Versatile (1d10). Mastery: Push. Weight: 5 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Whip
description: 1d4 Slashing. Properties: Finesse, Reach. Mastery: Slow. Weight: 3 lb. (Martial Melee Weapon)

name: Blowgun
description: 1 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 25/100; Needle), Loading. Mastery: Vex. Weight: 1 lb. (Martial Ranged Weapon)

name: Hand Crossbow
description: 1d6 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 30/120; Bolt), Light, Loading. Mastery: Vex. Weight: 3 lb. (Martial Ranged Weapon)

name: Heavy Crossbow
description: 1d10 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 100/400; Bolt), Heavy, Loading, Two-Handed. Mastery: Push. Weight: 18 lb. (Martial Ranged Weapon)

name: Longbow
description: 1d8 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 150/600; Arrow), Heavy, Two-Handed. Mastery: Slow. Weight: 2 lb. (Martial Ranged Weapon)

name: Musket
description: 1d12 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 40/120; Bullet), Loading, Two-Handed. Mastery: Slow. Weight: 10 lb. (Martial Ranged Weapon)

name: Pistol
description: 1d10 Piercing. Properties: Ammunition (Range 30/90; Bullet), Loading. Mastery: Vex. Weight: 3 lb. (Martial Ranged Weapon)

name: Alchemist's Supplies
description: Ability: Intelligence. Weight: 8 lb. Utilize: Identify a substance (DC 15), or start a fire (DC 15). Craft: Acid, Alchemist's Fire, Component Pouch, Oil, Paper, Perfume. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Brewer's Supplies
description: Ability: Intelligence. Weight: 9 lb. Utilize: Detect poisoned drink (DC 15), or identify alcohol (DC 10). Craft: Antitoxin. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Calligrapher's Supplies
description: Ability: Dexterity. Weight: 5 lb. Utilize: Write text with impressive flourishes that guard against forgery (DC 15). Craft: Ink, Spell Scroll. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Carpenter's Tools
description: Ability: Strength. Weight: 6 lb. Utilize: Seal or pry open a door or container (DC 20). Craft: Club, Greatclub, Quarterstaff, Barrel, Chest, Ladder, Pole, Portable Ram, Torch. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Cartographer's Tools
description: Ability: Wisdom. Weight: 6 lb. Utilize: Draft a map of a small area (DC 15). Craft: Map. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Cobbler's Tools
description: Ability: Dexterity. Weight: 5 lb. Utilize: Modify footwear to give Advantage on the wearer's next Dexterity (Acrobatics) check (DC 10). Craft: Climber's Kit. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Cook's Utensils
description: Ability: Wisdom. Weight: 8 lb. Utilize: Improve food's flavor (DC 10), or detect spoiled or poisoned food (DC 15). Craft: Rations. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Glassblower's Tools
description: Ability: Intelligence. Weight: 5 lb. Utilize: Discern what a glass object held in the past 24 hours (DC 15). Craft: Glass Bottle, Magnifying Glass, Spyglass, Vial. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Jeweler's Tools
description: Ability: Intelligence. Weight: 2 lb. Utilize: Discern a gem's value (DC 15). Craft: Arcane Focus, Holy Symbol. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Leatherworker's Tools
description: Ability: Dexterity. Weight: 5 lb. Utilize: Add a design to a leather item (DC 10). Craft: Sling, Whip, Hide Armor, Leather Armor, Studded Leather Armor, Backpack, Crossbow Bolt Case, Map or Scroll Case, Parchment, Pouch, Quiver, Waterskin. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Mason's Tools
description: Ability: Strength. Weight: 8 lb. Utilize: Chisel a symbol or hole in stone (DC 10). Craft: Block and Tackle. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Painter's Supplies
description: Ability: Wisdom. Weight: 5 lb. Utilize: Paint a recognizable image of something you've seen (DC 10). Craft: Druidic Focus, Holy Symbol. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Potter's Tools
description: Ability: Intelligence. Weight: 3 lb. Utilize: Discern what a ceramic object held in the past 24 hours (DC 15). Craft: Jug, Lamp. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Smith's Tools
description: Ability: Strength. Weight: 8 lb. Utilize: Pry open a door or container (DC 20). Craft: Any Melee weapon (except Club, Greatclub, Quarterstaff, and Whip), Medium armor (except Hide), Heavy armor, Ball Bearings, Bucket, Caltrops, Chain, Crowbar, Firearm Bullets, Grappling Hook, Iron Pot, Iron Spikes, Sling Bullets. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Tinker's Tools
description: Ability: Dexterity. Weight: 10 lb. Utilize: Assemble a Tiny item composed of scrap, which falls apart in 1 minute (DC 20). Craft: Musket, Pistol, Bell, Bullseye Lantern, Flask, Hooded Lantern, Hunter's Trap, Lock, Manacles, Mirror, Shovel, Signal Whistle, Tinderbox. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Weaver's Tools
description: Ability: Dexterity. Weight: 5 lb. Utilize: Mend a tear in clothing (DC 10), or sew a Tiny design (DC 10). Craft: Padded Armor, Basket, Bedroll, Blanket, Fine Clothes, Net, Robe, Rope, Sack, String, Tent, Traveler's Clothes. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Woodcarver's Tools
description: Ability: Dexterity. Weight: 5 lb. Utilize: Carve a pattern in wood (DC 10). Craft: Club, Greatclub, Quarterstaff, Ranged weapons (except Pistol, Musket, and Sling), Arcane Focus, Arrows, Bolts, Druidic Focus, Ink Pen, Needles. (Artisan's Tools)

name: Disguise Kit
description: Ability: Charisma. Weight: 3 lb. Utilize: Apply makeup (DC 10). Craft: Costume.

name: Forgery Kit
description: Ability: Dexterity. Weight: 5 lb. Utilize: Mimic 10 or fewer words of someone else's handwriting (DC 15), or duplicate a wax seal (DC 20).

name: Dice Set
description: Ability: Wisdom. Utilize: Discern whether someone is cheating (DC 10), or win the game (DC 20). (Gaming Set)

name: Dragonchess Set
description: Ability: Wisdom. Utilize: Discern whether someone is cheating (DC 10), or win the game (DC 20). (Gaming Set)

name: Playing Cards
description: Ability: Wisdom. Utilize: Discern whether someone is cheating (DC 10), or win the game (DC 20). (Gaming Set)

name: Three-Dragon Ante Set
description: Ability: Wisdom. Utilize: Discern whether someone is cheating (DC 10), or win the game (DC 20). (Gaming Set)

name: Herbalism Kit
description: Ability: Intelligence. Weight: 3 lb. Utilize: Identify a plant (DC 10). Craft: Antitoxin, Candle, Healer's Kit, Potion of Healing.

name: Bagpipes
description: Ability: Charisma. Weight: 6 lb. Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15). (Musical Instrument)

name: Drum
description: Ability: Charisma. Weight: 3 lb. Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15). (Musical Instrument)

name: Dulcimer
description: Ability: Charisma. Weight: 10 lb. Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15). (Musical Instrument)

name: Flute
description: Ability: Charisma. Weight: 1 lb. Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15). (Musical Instrument)

name: Horn
description: Ability: Charisma. Weight: 2 lb. Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15). (Musical Instrument)

name: Lute
description: Ability: Charisma. Weight: 2 lb. Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15). (Musical Instrument)

name: Lyre
description: Ability: Charisma. Weight: 2 lb. Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15). (Musical Instrument)

name: Pan Flute
description: Ability: Charisma. Weight: 2 lb. Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15). (Musical Instrument)

name: Shawm
description: Ability: Charisma. Weight: 1 lb. Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15). (Musical Instrument)

name: Viol
description: Ability: Charisma. Weight: 1 lb. Utilize: Play a known tune (DC 10), or improvise a song (DC 15). (Musical Instrument)

name: Navigator's Tools
description: Ability: Wisdom. Weight: 2 lb. Utilize: Plot a course (DC 10), or determine position by stargazing (DC 15).

name: Poisoner's Kit
description: Ability: Intelligence. Weight: 2 lb. Utilize: Detect a poisoned object (DC 10). Craft: Basic Poison.

name: Thieves' Tools
description: Ability: Dexterity. Weight: 1 lb. Utilize: Pick a lock (DC 15), or disarm a trap (DC 15).

name: Acid
description: Weight: 1 lb. As an Attack action, you can throw a vial of Acid at a creature or object within 20 ft. Target must succeed on a Dex save (DC 8 + Dex mod + Prof) or take 2d6 Acid damage.

name: Alchemist's Fire
description: Weight: 1 lb. As an Attack action, you can throw a flask at a creature or object within 20 ft. Target must succeed on a Dex save (DC 8 + Dex mod + Prof) or take 1d4 Fire damage and start burning.

name: Arrows (20)
description: Weight: 1 lb. Ammunition for weapons with the Ammunition property. Stored in a Quiver. (Ammunition)

name: Bolts (20)
description: Weight: 1 1/2 lb. Ammunition for crossbows. Stored in a Crossbow Bolt Case. (Ammunition)

name: Firearm Bullets (10)
description: Weight: 2 lb. Ammunition for firearms. Stored in a Pouch. (Ammunition)

name: Sling Bullets (20)
description: Weight: 1 1/2 lb. Ammunition for slings. Stored in a Pouch. (Ammunition)

name: Needles (50)
description: Weight: 1 lb. Ammunition for blowguns. Stored in a Pouch. (Ammunition)

name: Antitoxin
description: As a Bonus Action, you can drink a vial of Antitoxin to gain Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Poisoned condition for 1 hour.

name: Crystal (Arcane Focus)
description: Weight: 1 lb. A bejeweled or carved crystal used to channel arcane magic. A Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard can use it as a Spellcasting Focus. (Arcane Focus)

name: Orb (Arcane Focus)
description: Weight: 3 lb. A bejeweled or carved orb used to channel arcane magic. A Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard can use it as a Spellcasting Focus. (Arcane Focus)

name: Rod (Arcane Focus)
description: Weight: 2 lb. A bejeweled or carved rod used to channel arcane magic. A Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard can use it as a Spellcasting Focus. (Arcane Focus)

name: Staff (Arcane Focus)
description: Weight: 4 lb. A bejeweled or carved staff used to channel arcane magic. Also functions as a Quarterstaff. A Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard can use it as a Spellcasting Focus. (Arcane Focus)

name: Wand (Arcane Focus)
description: Weight: 1 lb. A bejeweled or carved wand used to channel arcane magic. A Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard can use it as a Spellcasting Focus. (Arcane Focus)

name: Backpack
description: Weight: 5 lb. Holds up to 30 pounds within 1 cubic foot. Can also serve as a saddlebag.

name: Ball Bearings
description: Weight: 2 lb. As a Utilize action, spill to cover a 10-ft-square area within 10 ft. A creature entering for the first time on a turn must succeed on a DC 10 Dex save or fall Prone. Takes 10 minutes to recover.

name: Barrel
description: Weight: 70 lb. Holds up to 40 gallons of liquid or up to 4 cubic feet of dry goods.

name: Basket
description: Weight: 2 lb. Holds up to 40 pounds within 2 cubic feet.

name: Bedroll
description: Weight: 7 lb. Sleeps one Small or Medium creature. While in a Bedroll, you automatically succeed on saving throws against extreme cold.

name: Bell
description: When rung as a Utilize action, produces a sound that can be heard up to 60 feet away.

name: Blanket
description: Weight: 3 lb. While wrapped in a blanket, you have Advantage on saving throws against extreme cold.

name: Block and Tackle
description: Weight: 5 lb. Allows you to hoist up to four times the weight you can normally lift.

name: Book
description: Weight: 5 lb. Contains fiction or nonfiction. Consulting an accurate nonfiction Book grants a +5 bonus to Int (Arcana, History, Nature, or Religion) checks about its topic.

name: Glass Bottle
description: Weight: 2 lb. Holds up to 1 1/2 pints.

name: Bucket
description: Weight: 2 lb. Holds up to half a cubic foot of contents.

name: Burglar's Pack
description: Weight: 42 lb. Contains: Backpack, Ball Bearings, Bell, 10 Candles, Crowbar, Hooded Lantern, 7 flasks of Oil, 5 days of Rations, Rope, Tinderbox, and Waterskin.

name: Caltrops
description: Weight: 2 lb. As a Utilize action, spread to cover a 5-ft-square area within 5 ft. A creature entering for the first time on a turn must succeed on a DC 15 Dex save or take 1 Piercing damage and have Speed reduced to 0. Takes 10 minutes to recover.

name: Candle
description: For 1 hour, a lit Candle sheds Bright Light in a 5-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 5 feet.

name: Crossbow Bolt Case
description: Weight: 1 lb. Holds up to 20 Bolts.

name: Map or Scroll Case
description: Weight: 1 lb. Holds up to 10 sheets of paper or 5 sheets of parchment.

name: Chain
description: Weight: 10 lb. As a Utilize action, wrap around a Grappled/Incapacitated/Restrained creature within 5 ft (DC 13 Str Athletics). Bound creature is Restrained. Escape: DC 18 Dex (Acrobatics). Burst: DC 20 Str (Athletics).

name: Chest
description: Weight: 25 lb. Holds up to 12 cubic feet of contents.

name: Climber's Kit
description: Weight: 12 lb. Includes boot tips, gloves, pitons, and a harness. As a Utilize action, anchor yourself; you can't fall more than 25 ft from the anchor point.

name: Fine Clothes
description: Weight: 6 lb. Made of expensive fabrics and adorned with expertly crafted details. Some events and locations admit only people wearing these clothes.

name: Traveler's Clothes
description: Weight: 4 lb. Resilient garments designed for travel in various environments.

name: Component Pouch
description: Weight: 2 lb. A watertight pouch filled with compartments that hold all the free Material components of your spells.

name: Costume
description: Weight: 4 lb. While wearing a Costume, you have Advantage on any ability check you make to impersonate the person or type of person it represents.

name: Crowbar
description: Weight: 5 lb. Using a Crowbar gives you Advantage on Strength checks where its leverage can be applied.

name: Diplomat's Pack
description: Weight: 39 lb. Contains: Chest, Fine Clothes, Ink, 5 Ink Pens, Lamp, 2 Map or Scroll Cases, 4 flasks of Oil, 5 sheets of Paper, 5 sheets of Parchment, Perfume, and Tinderbox.

name: Sprig of Mistletoe (Druidic Focus)
description: Carved, tied with ribbon, or painted to channel primal magic. A Druid or Ranger can use it as a Spellcasting Focus. (Druidic Focus)

name: Wooden Staff (Druidic Focus)
description: Weight: 4 lb. Carved, tied with ribbon, or painted to channel primal magic. Also functions as a Quarterstaff. A Druid or Ranger can use it as a Spellcasting Focus. (Druidic Focus)

name: Yew Wand (Druidic Focus)
description: Weight: 1 lb. Carved, tied with ribbon, or painted to channel primal magic. A Druid or Ranger can use it as a Spellcasting Focus. (Druidic Focus)

name: Dungeoneer's Pack
description: Weight: 55 lb. Contains: Backpack, Caltrops, Crowbar, 2 flasks of Oil, 10 days of Rations, Rope, Tinderbox, 10 Torches, and Waterskin.

name: Entertainer's Pack
description: Weight: 58 1/2 lb. Contains: Backpack, Bedroll, Bell, Bullseye Lantern, 3 Costumes, Mirror, 8 flasks of Oil, 9 days of Rations, Tinderbox, and Waterskin.

name: Explorer's Pack
description: Weight: 55 lb. Contains: Backpack, Bedroll, 2 flasks of Oil, 10 days of Rations, Rope, Tinderbox, 10 Torches, and Waterskin.

name: Flask
description: Weight: 1 lb. Holds up to 1 pint.

name: Grappling Hook
description: Weight: 4 lb. As a Utilize action, throw at a railing, ledge, or catch within 50 ft (DC 13 Dex Acrobatics to catch). If tied to a Rope, you can then climb it.

name: Healer's Kit
description: Weight: 3 lb. Has ten uses. As a Utilize action, expend one use to stabilize an Unconscious creature at 0 HP without needing a Wisdom (Medicine) check.

name: Amulet (Holy Symbol)
description: Weight: 1 lb. Worn or held. Bejeweled or painted to channel divine magic. A Cleric or Paladin can use it as a Spellcasting Focus. (Holy Symbol)

name: Emblem (Holy Symbol)
description: Borne on fabric or a Shield. Bejeweled or painted to channel divine magic. A Cleric or Paladin can use it as a Spellcasting Focus. (Holy Symbol)

name: Reliquary (Holy Symbol)
description: Weight: 2 lb. Held. Bejeweled or painted to channel divine magic. A Cleric or Paladin can use it as a Spellcasting Focus. (Holy Symbol)

name: Holy Water
description: Weight: 1 lb. As an Attack action, throw at a creature within 20 ft. Target must succeed on a Dex save (DC 8 + Dex mod + Prof) or take 2d8 Radiant damage if it is a Fiend or an Undead.

name: Hunting Trap
description: Weight: 25 lb. As a Utilize action, set the trap. A creature stepping on it must succeed on a DC 13 Dex save or take 1d4 Piercing damage and have Speed reduced to 0. Escape: DC 13 Str (Athletics) action.

name: Ink
description: Comes in a 1-ounce bottle, which provides enough ink to write about 500 pages.

name: Ink Pen
description: Using Ink, an Ink Pen is used to write or draw.

name: Jug
description: Weight: 4 lb. Holds up to 1 gallon.

name: Ladder
description: Weight: 25 lb. 10 feet tall. You must climb to move up or down it.

name: Lamp
description: Weight: 1 lb. Burns Oil as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 15-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet.

name: Bullseye Lantern
description: Weight: 2 lb. Burns Oil as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 60-foot Cone and Dim Light for an additional 60 feet.

name: Hooded Lantern
description: Weight: 2 lb. Burns Oil as fuel to cast Bright Light in a 30-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet. As a Bonus Action, lower the hood to reduce to Dim Light in a 5-foot radius, or raise it again.

name: Lock
description: Weight: 1 lb. Comes with a key. Without the key, a creature can use Thieves' Tools to pick it with a DC 15 Dex (Sleight of Hand) check.

name: Magnifying Glass
description: Grants Advantage on any ability check made to appraise or inspect a highly detailed item. Can light a fire with sunlight (takes about 5 minutes).

name: Manacles
description: Weight: 6 lb. As a Utilize action, bind a Grappled/Incapacitated/Restrained Small or Medium creature within 5 ft (DC 13 Dex Sleight of Hand). Bound creature has Disadvantage on attacks and is Restrained if fixed in place. Escape: DC 20 Dex. Burst: DC 25 Str.

name: Map
description: Consulting an accurate Map grants a +5 bonus to Wisdom (Survival) checks to find your way in the place it represents.

name: Mirror
description: Weight: 1/2 lb. A handheld steel Mirror useful for personal cosmetics, peeking around corners, and reflecting light as a signal.

name: Net
description: Weight: 3 lb. As an Attack action, throw at a creature within 15 ft. Target must succeed on a Dex save (DC 8 + Dex mod + Prof) or be Restrained. Escape: DC 10 Str (Athletics) action. Destroying the Net (AC 10; 5 HP) also frees the target.

name: Oil
description: Weight: 1 lb. Douse a creature within 20 ft (Dex save or take extra 5 Fire damage if ignited within 1 min), pour on ground to cover 5-ft square (5 Fire damage), or use as fuel for Lamps/Lanterns (burns 6 hours).

name: Paper
description: One sheet of Paper can hold about 250 handwritten words.

name: Parchment
description: One sheet of Parchment can hold about 250 handwritten words.

name: Perfume
description: Comes in a 4-ounce vial. For 1 hour after applying, you have Advantage on Charisma (Persuasion) checks to influence an Indifferent Humanoid within 5 feet.

name: Basic Poison
description: As a Bonus Action, coat one weapon or up to three pieces of ammunition. A creature taking Piercing or Slashing damage from the poisoned weapon takes an extra 1d4 Poison damage. Lasts 1 minute or until damage is dealt.

name: Pole
description: Weight: 7 lb. 10 feet long. Touch something up to 10 ft away. Use to vault for Advantage on High/Long Jump Str (Athletics) checks.

name: Iron Pot
description: Weight: 10 lb. Holds up to 1 gallon.

name: Potion of Climbing
description: When you drink this potion, you gain a Climb Speed equal to your Speed for 1 hour. During this time, you have Advantage on Strength (Athletics) checks to climb.

name: Potion of Comprehension
description: When you drink this potion, you gain the effect of the Comprehend Languages spell for 1 hour.

name: Potion of Healing
description: Weight: 1/2 lb. Magic item. As a Bonus Action, drink it or administer to a creature within 5 ft. The creature regains 2d4 + 2 Hit Points.

name: Pouch
description: Weight: 1 lb. Holds up to 6 pounds within one-fifth of a cubic foot.

name: Priest's Pack
description: Weight: 29 lb. Contains: Backpack, Blanket, Holy Water, Lamp, 7 days of Rations, Robe, and Tinderbox.

name: Quiver
description: Weight: 1 lb. Holds up to 20 Arrows.

name: Portable Ram
description: Weight: 35 lb. Use to break down doors with a +4 bonus to the Strength check. One other character can help, giving you Advantage.

name: Rations
description: Weight: 2 lb. Travel-ready food including jerky, dried fruit, hardtack, and nuts. One day's worth.

name: Robe
description: Weight: 4 lb. Has vocational or ceremonial significance. Some events and locations admit only people wearing a Robe bearing certain colors or symbols.

name: Rope
description: Weight: 5 lb. 50 feet long. Tie a knot as a Utilize action (DC 10 Dex Sleight of Hand). Burst: DC 20 Str (Athletics). Can bind an unwilling Grappled/Incapacitated/Restrained creature; Restrained if legs bound. Escape: DC 15 Dex (Acrobatics).

name: Sack
description: Weight: 1/2 lb. Holds up to 30 pounds within 1 cubic foot.

name: Scholar's Pack
description: Weight: 22 lb. Contains: Backpack, Book, Ink, Ink Pen, Lamp, 10 flasks of Oil, 10 sheets of Parchment, and Tinderbox.

name: Shovel
description: Weight: 5 lb. Working for 1 hour, you can dig a hole that is 5 feet on each side in soil or similar material.

name: Signal Whistle
description: When blown as a Utilize action, produces a sound that can be heard up to 600 feet away.

name: Spell Scroll (Cantrip)
description: Bears the words of a cantrip. Any creature that can read may cast the spell using its normal casting time, without providing Material components. Spell save DC 13, attack bonus +5. Scroll disintegrates after casting.

name: Spell Scroll (Level 1)
description: Bears the words of a level 1 spell. Any creature that can read may cast the spell using its normal casting time, without providing Material components. Spell save DC 13, attack bonus +5. Scroll disintegrates after casting.

name: Spell Scroll (Level 2)
description: Bears the words of a level 2 spell. Any creature that can read may cast the spell using its normal casting time, without providing Material components. Spell save DC 13, attack bonus +5. Scroll disintegrates after casting.

name: Iron Spikes (10)
description: Weight: 5 lb. As a Utilize action, hammer a spike into wood, earth, or similar material to jam a door shut or tie a Rope or Chain to it.

name: Spyglass
description: Weight: 1 lb. Objects viewed through a Spyglass are magnified to twice their size.

name: String
description: 10 feet long. You can tie a knot in it as a Utilize action.

name: Tent
description: Weight: 20 lb. Sleeps up to two Small or Medium creatures.

name: Tinderbox
description: Weight: 1 lb. Contains flint, fire steel, and tinder. Lighting a Candle, Lamp, Lantern, or Torch takes a Bonus Action. Lighting any other fire takes 1 minute.

name: Torch
description: Weight: 1 lb. Burns for 1 hour, casting Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 feet. Can be used as a Simple Melee weapon dealing 1 Fire damage on a hit.

name: Vial
description: Holds up to 4 ounces.

name: Waterskin
description: Weight: 5 lb. (full). Holds up to 4 pints. If you don't drink sufficient water, you risk dehydration.

name: Exotic Saddle
description: Weight: 40 lb. Required for riding an aquatic or a flying mount. Comes with a bit, a bridle, reins, and any other equipment needed to use the saddle.

name: Military Saddle
description: Weight: 30 lb. Gives Advantage on any ability check you make to remain mounted. Comes with a bit, a bridle, reins, and any other equipment needed to use the saddle.

name: Riding Saddle
description: Weight: 25 lb. Comes with a bit, a bridle, reins, and any other equipment needed to use the saddle.

name: Canoe
description: Holds up to six Medium creatures. Maximum speed of 2 mph. Otherwise identical to a rowboat.

name: Insect Repellent (Incense)
description: A block of incense. When lit, burns for 8 hours and repels normal insects within a 20-foot radius centered on it. Does not protect against giant insects or swarms.

name: Insect Repellent (Salve)
description: A gourd or vial containing 20 applications of odorless, waterproof grease. One application protects against normal insects for 24 hours. Does not protect against giant insects or swarms.

name: Rain Catcher
description: Weight: 5 lb. A 5-foot-square leather tarp on a wooden frame with legs. Catches 2 gallons of drinking water per inch of rainfall and holds up to 8 gallons. Folds up for easy transport.

name: Tej (Mug)
description: An amber-colored, fermented drink made from honey. More common and popular in Chult than beer or ale.

name: Tej (1-gallon Cask)
description: A 1-gallon cask of tej, an amber-colored fermented drink made from honey. More common and popular in Chult than beer or ale.

name: Yklwa
description: 1d8 Piercing. Properties: Thrown (Range 10/30). Mastery: Sap. Weight: 3 lb. Traditional weapon of Chultan warriors. A 3-foot wooden shaft with a steel or stone blade up to 18 inches long. Not well balanced for throwing. (Simple Melee Weapon)

name: +1 Ammunition (per piece)
description: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this piece of magic ammunition. Once it hits a target, the ammunition is no longer magical.

name: +1 Shield, Wooden
description: AC +3 (base +2, plus +1 magical bonus). A wooden shield imbued with magic. While holding this shield, you have a +1 bonus to AC in addition to the shield's normal bonus to AC.

name: +1 Dagger
description: 1d4+1 Piercing. Properties: Finesse, Light, Thrown (Range 20/60). You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

name: +1 Yklwa
description: 1d8+1 Piercing. Properties: Thrown (Range 10/30). Mastery: Sap. You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon. Traditional weapon of Chultan warriors. (Simple Melee Weapon)

name: Flying Monkey
description: A domesticated flying monkey, slightly more clever and curious than a common monkey, with feathered wings spanning about 5 feet. Can be taught to obey simple commands.

name: Giant Lizard
description: A trained giant lizard that can be used as a mount or beast of burden.

name: Hadrosaurus
description: A trained hadrosaurus, a semi-quadrupedal herbivore recognizable by its bony head crests. Can carry a Small or Medium rider.

name: Ankylosaurus
description: A trained ankylosaurus, a heavily armored dinosaur with a devastating tail club.

name: Deinonychus
description: A trained deinonychus, a larger cousin of the velociraptor. An agile and aggressive predator.

name: Flying Snake
description: A trained flying snake, a brightly colored serpent with wing-like fins that allow it to glide through the air.

name: Triceratops
description: A trained triceratops, a massive three-horned dinosaur with a protective bony frill.

name: Potion of Greater Healing
description: You regain 4d4 + 4 Hit Points when you drink this potion. The potion's red liquid glimmers when agitated.

name: Potion of Animal Friendship
description: When you drink this potion, you can cast the level 3 version of the Animal Friendship spell (save DC 13).

name: Potion of Fire Breath
description: After drinking this potion, you can take a Bonus Action to exhale fire at a target within 30 feet. The target makes a DC 13 Dex save, taking 4d6 Fire damage on a failure or half on a success. The effect ends after 3 uses or 1 hour.

name: Potion of Growth
description: When you drink this potion, you gain the "enlarge" effect of the Enlarge/Reduce spell for 10 minutes (no Concentration required).

name: Potion of Hill Giant Strength
description: When you drink this potion, your Strength score changes to 21 for 1 hour. The potion has no effect if your Strength is already equal to or greater than 21.

name: Potion of Pugilism
description: After you drink this potion, each Unarmed Strike you make deals an extra 1d6 Force damage on a hit. This effect lasts 10 minutes.

name: Potion of Resistance
description: When you drink this potion, you have Resistance to one type of damage for 1 hour. The type is determined when the potion is created (Acid, Cold, Fire, Force, Lightning, Necrotic, Poison, Psychic, Radiant, or Thunder).

name: Potion of Water Breathing
description: You can breathe underwater for 24 hours after drinking this potion.

name: Oil of Slipperiness
description: One vial covers one Medium or smaller creature plus its equipment (one additional vial per size above Medium). Applying takes 10 minutes. The affected creature gains the effect of the Freedom of Movement spell for 8 hours.

name: +1 Wraps of Unarmed Power
description: While wearing these wraps, you have a +1 bonus to attack rolls and damage rolls made with your Unarmed Strikes. Those strikes deal your choice of Force damage or their normal damage type.

name: Alchemy Jug
description: This ceramic jug appears to be able to hold a gallon of liquid and weighs 12 pounds whether full or empty. The jug sloshes when it is shaken, even if the jug is empty.

name: Amulet of Proof against Detection and Location
description: Requires attunement. While wearing this amulet, you can't be targeted by Divination spells or perceived through magical scrying sensors unless you allow it.

name: Baba Yaga's Dancing Broom
description: Requires attunement. The archfey Baba Yaga crafted many of these magic brooms. No two appear exactly alike. While holding the broom, you can take a Magic action to transform it into an Animated Broom under your control. The broom then moves into an unoccupied space as close to you as possible. The broom acts immediately after you on your Initiative count and remains animate until you take a Bonus Action and use a command word to render it inanimate.

name: Bag of Holding
description: This bag has an interior space considerably larger than its outside dimensions—roughly 2 feet square and 4 feet deep on the inside. The bag can hold up to 500 pounds, not exceeding a volume of 64 cubic feet. The bag weighs 5 pounds, regardless of its contents. Retrieving an item from the bag requires a Utilize action.

name: Bag of Tricks, Gray
description: This bag made from gray cloth appears empty. Reaching inside the bag, however, reveals the presence of a small, fuzzy object.

name: Bag of Tricks, Rust
description: This bag made from rust cloth appears empty. Reaching inside the bag, however, reveals the presence of a small, fuzzy object.

name: Bag of Tricks, Tan
description: This bag made from tan cloth appears empty. Reaching inside the bag, however, reveals the presence of a small, fuzzy object.

name: Bead of Nourishment
description: This flavorless, gelatinous bead dissolves on your tongue and provides as much nourishment as 1 day of Rations.

name: Bead of Refreshment
description: This flavorless, gelatinous bead dissolves in liquid, transforming up to a pint of the liquid into fresh, cold drinking water. The bead has no effect on magical liquids or harmful substances such as poison.

name: Boots of Elvenkind
description: While you wear these boots, your steps make no sound, regardless of the surface you are moving across. You also have Advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

name: Boots of False Tracks
description: While wearing these boots, you can have them leave tracks like those of any kind of Humanoid of your size.

name: Boots of Striding and Springing
description: Requires attunement. While you wear these boots, your Speed becomes 30 feet unless your Speed is higher, and your Speed isn't reduced by you carrying weight in excess of your carrying capacity or wearing Heavy Armor.

name: Boots of the Winterlands
description: Requires attunement. These furred boots are snug and feel warm. While wearing them, you gain the following benefits.

name: Bracers of Archery
description: Requires attunement. While wearing these bracers, you have proficiency with the Longbow and Shortbow, and you gain a +2 bonus to damage rolls made with such weapons.

name: Brooch of Shielding
description: Requires attunement. While wearing this brooch, you have Resistance to Force damage, and you have Immunity to damage from the Magic Missile spell.

name: Broom of Flying
description: Requires attunement. This wooden broom functions like a mundane broom until you stand astride it and take a Magic action to make it hover beneath you, at which time it can be ridden in the air. It has a Fly Speed of 50 feet. It can carry up to 400 pounds, but its Fly Speed becomes 30 feet while carrying over 200 pounds. The broom stops hovering when you land or when you're no longer riding it.

name: Candle of the Deep
description: The flame of this candle isn't extinguished when immersed in water. It gives off light and heat like a normal candle.

name: Cap of Water Breathing
description: While wearing this cap underwater, you can take a Magic action to create a bubble of air around your head. This bubble allows you to breathe normally underwater. This bubble stays with you until the cap is removed or you are no longer underwater.

name: Charlatan's Die
description: Requires attunement. Whenever you roll this six-sided die, you can control which number it rolls.

name: Circlet of Blasting
description: While wearing this circlet, you can cast Scorching Ray with it (5 to hit). The circlet can't cast this spell again until the next dawn.

name: Cloak of Billowing
description: While wearing this cloak, you can take a Bonus Action to make it billow dramatically for 1 minute.

name: Cloak of Elvenkind
description: Requires attunement. While you wear this cloak, Wisdom (Perception) checks made to perceive you have Disadvantage, and you have Advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks.

name: Cloak of Many Fashions
description: While wearing this cloak, you can take a Bonus Action to change the style, color, and apparent quality of the garment. The cloak's weight doesn't change. Regardless of its appearance, the cloak can't be anything but a cloak. Although it can duplicate the appearance of other magic cloaks, it doesn't gain their magical properties.

name: Cloak of Protection
description: Requires attunement. You gain a +1 bonus to Armor Class and saving throws while you wear this cloak.

name: Cloak of the Manta Ray
description: Requires attunement. While wearing this cloak, you can breathe underwater, and you have a Swim Speed of 60 feet.

name: Clockwork Amulet
description: This copper amulet contains tiny interlocking gears and is powered by magic from Mechanus, a plane of clockwork predictability. Faint ticking and whirring noises emanate from within.

name: Clothes of Mending
description: This elegant outfit magically mends itself to counteract daily wear and tear. Pieces of the outfit that are destroyed can't be repaired in this way.

name: Dark Shard Amulet
description: Requires attunement by by a warlock. This amulet is fashioned from a shard of resilient material originating from an otherworldly realm. While you are wearing it, you gain the following benefits.

name: Decanter of Endless Water
description: This stoppered flask sloshes when shaken, as if it contains water. The decanter weighs 2 pounds.

name: Deck of Illusions
description: This box contains a set of cards. A full deck has 34 cards: 32 depicting specific creatures and two with a mirrored surface. A deck found as treasure is usually missing 1d20 - 1 cards.

name: Dread Helm
description: While you're wearing this fearsome steel helm, your eyes glow red and the rest of your face is hidden in shadow.

name: Driftglobe
description: This small sphere of thick glass weighs 1 pound. If you are within 60 feet of it, you can command it to emanate light equivalent to that of the Light or Daylight spell (your choice). Once used, the Daylight effect can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Dust of Disappearance
description: This powder resembles fine sand. There is enough of it for one use. When you take a Utilize action to throw the dust into the air, you and each creature and object within a 10-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from you have the Invisible condition for 2d4 minutes. The duration is the same for all subjects, and the dust is consumed when its magic takes effect. Immediately after an affected creature makes an attack roll, deals damage, or casts a spell, the Invisible condition ends for that creature.

name: Dust of Dryness
description: This small packet contains 1d6 + 4 pinches of dust. As a Utilize action, you can sprinkle a pinch of the dust over water, turning up to a 15-foot Cube [Area of Effect] of water into one marble-sized pellet, which floats or rests near where the dust was sprinkled. The pellet's weight is negligible. A creature can take a Utilize action to smash the pellet against a hard surface, causing the pellet to shatter and release the water the dust absorbed. Doing so destroys the pellet and ends its magic.

name: Dust of Sneezing and Choking
description: Found in a small container, this powder resembles Dust of Disappearance, and Identify reveals it to be such. There is enough of it for one use.

name: Ear Horn of Hearing
description: While held up to your ear, this horn suppresses the effects of the Deafened condition on you.

name: Elemental Gem, Blue Sapphire
description: This gem contains a mote of elemental energy. When you take a Utilize action to break the gem, an Air Elemental is summoned, and the gem ceases to be magical. The elemental appears in an unoccupied space as close to the broken gem as possible, understands your languages, obeys your commands, and takes its turn immediately after you on your Initiative count. The elemental disappears after 1 hour, when it dies, or when you dismiss it as a Bonus Action.

name: Elemental Gem, Emerald
description: This gem contains a mote of elemental energy. When you take a Utilize action to break the gem, a Water Elemental is summoned, and the gem ceases to be magical. The elemental appears in an unoccupied space as close to the broken gem as possible, understands your languages, obeys your commands, and takes its turn immediately after you on your Initiative count. The elemental disappears after 1 hour, when it dies, or when you dismiss it as a Bonus Action.

name: Elemental Gem, Red Corundum
description: This gem contains a mote of elemental energy. When you take a Utilize action to break the gem, a Fire Elemental is summoned, and the gem ceases to be magical. The elemental appears in an unoccupied space as close to the broken gem as possible, understands your languages, obeys your commands, and takes its turn immediately after you on your Initiative count. The elemental disappears after 1 hour, when it dies, or when you dismiss it as a Bonus Action.

name: Elemental Gem, Yellow Diamond
description: This gem contains a mote of elemental energy. When you take a Utilize action to break the gem, an Earth Elemental is summoned, and the gem ceases to be magical. The elemental appears in an unoccupied space as close to the broken gem as possible, understands your languages, obeys your commands, and takes its turn immediately after you on your Initiative count. The elemental disappears after 1 hour, when it dies, or when you dismiss it as a Bonus Action.

name: Enduring Spellbook
description: This spellbook, along with anything written on its pages, can't be damaged by fire or water. In addition, the spellbook doesn't deteriorate with age.

name: Ersatz Eye
description: This magical eye replaces a real one that was lost or removed. While the Ersatz Eye is embedded in your eye socket, you can see through the tiny orb as though it were your natural eye. You can insert or remove the Ersatz Eye as a Magic action, and it can't be removed against your will while you are alive.

name: Eversmoking Bottle
description: As a Magic action, you can open or close this bottle.

name: Eyes of Charming
description: Requires attunement. These crystal lenses fit over the eyes. They have 3 charges. While wearing them, you can expend 1 or more charges to cast Charm Person (save 13). For 1 charge, you cast the level 1 version of the spell. You increase the spell's level by one for each additional charge you expend. The lenses regain all expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Eyes of Minute Seeing
description: These crystal lenses fit over the eyes. While wearing them, your vision improves significantly out to a range of 1 foot, granting you Darkvision within that range and Advantage on Intelligence (Investigation) checks made to examine something within that range.

name: Eyes of the Eagle
description: These crystal lenses fit over the eyes. While wearing them, you have Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks that rely on sight. In conditions of clear visibility, you can make out details of even extremely distant creatures and objects as small as 2 feet across.

name: Figurine of Wondrous Power, Silver Raven
description: A Figurine of Wondrous Power is a statuette small enough to fit in a pocket. If you take a Magic action to throw the figurine to a point on the ground within 60 feet of yourself, the figurine becomes a living creature specified in the figurine's description below. If the space where the creature would appear is occupied by other creatures or objects, or if there isn't enough space for the creature, the figurine doesn't become a creature.

name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
description: Requires attunement. Your Strength score is 19 while you wear these gauntlets. They have no effect on you if your Strength is 19 or higher without them.

name: Gem of Brightness
description: This prism has 50 charges. While you are holding it, you can take a Magic action and use one of three command words to cause one of the following effects:

name: Gloves of Missile Snaring
description: Requires attunement. If you're hit by an attack roll made with a Ranged or Thrown weapon while wearing these gloves, you can take a Reaction to reduce the damage by 1d10 plus your Dexterity modifier if you have a free hand. If you reduce the damage to 0, you can catch the ammunition or weapon if it is small enough for you to hold in that hand.

name: Gloves of Swimming and Climbing
description: Requires attunement. While wearing these gloves, climbing and swimming don't cost you extra movement, and you gain a +5 bonus to Strength (Athletics) checks made to climb or swim.

name: Gloves of Thievery
description: These gloves are imperceptible while worn. While wearing them, you gain a +5 bonus to Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) checks.

name: Goggles of Night
description: While wearing these dark lenses, you have Darkvision out to 60 feet. If you already have Darkvision, wearing the goggles increases its range by 60 feet.

name: Hag Eye
description: A Hag Eye has 3 charges. While wearing or holding this item, you can expend 1 charge to cast Darkvision (targeting yourself only) or See Invisibility. The Hag Eye regains all expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Hat of Disguise
description: Requires attunement. While wearing this hat, you can cast the Disguise Self spell. The spell ends if the hat is removed.

name: Hat of Vermin
description: This hat has 3 charges. While holding the hat, you can take a Magic action to expend 1 charge and summon your choice of a Bat, a Frog, or a Rat. The summoned creature magically appears in the hat and tries to get away from you as quickly as possible. The creature is Indifferent [Attitude] toward you and other creatures, and it isn't under your control. It behaves as an ordinary creature of its kind and disappears after 1 hour or when it drops to 0 Hit Points. The hat regains all expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Hat of Wizardry
description: Requires attunement by by a wizard. This cone-shaped hat is adorned with moons and stars. While you are wearing it, you gain the following benefits.

name: Headband of Intellect
description: Requires attunement. Your Intelligence score is 19 while you wear this headband. It has no effect on you if your Intelligence is 19 or higher without it.

name: Helm of Comprehending Languages
description: While wearing this helm, you can cast Comprehend Languages from it.

name: Helm of Telepathy
description: Requires attunement. While wearing this helm, you have telepathy with a range of 30 feet, and you can cast Detect Thoughts or Suggestion (save 13) from the helm. Once either spell is cast from the helm, that spell can't be cast from it again until the next dawn.

name: Heward's Handy Spice Pouch
description: This belt pouch appears empty and has 10 charges. While holding the pouch, you can take a Magic action to expend 1 charge, name any nonmagical food seasoning (such as salt, pepper, saffron, or cilantro), and remove a pinch of the desired seasoning from the pouch. A pinch is enough to season a single meal. The pouch regains 1d6 + 4 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Horn of Silent Alarm
description: This horn has 4 charges and regains 1d4 expended charges daily at dawn. As a Magic action, you can blow the horn while expending 1 charge. One creature of your choice hears the horn's blare, provided that creature is within 600 feet of the horn. No other creature hears the horn.

name: Instrument of Illusions
description: While you are playing this musical instrument, you can take a Magic action to create harmless, illusory visual effects within a 5-foot Emanation [Area of Effect] originating from the instrument. If you are a Bard, the size of the Emanation [Area of Effect] increases to 15 feet. Sample visual effects include luminous musical notes, a spectral dancer, butterflies, and gently falling snow. The magical effects have neither substance nor sound, and they are obviously illusory. The effects end when you stop playing.

name: Instrument of Scribing
description: This musical instrument has 3 charges and regains all expended charges daily at dawn. While you are playing it, you can take a Magic action to expend 1 charge and write a magical message on a nonmagical object or surface that you can see within 30 feet of yourself. The message can be up to six words long and is written in a language you know. If you are a Bard, you can scribe an additional seven words and make the message glow faintly, allowing it to be seen in nonmagical Darkness. Casting the Dispel Magic spell on the message erases it. Otherwise, the message fades away after 24 hours.

name: Instrument of the Bards, Doss Lute
description: Requires attunement by by a bard. An Instrument of the Bards is superior to an ordinary instrument in every way. Seven types of these instruments exist, each named after a bard college. A creature that attempts to play the instrument without being attuned to it must succeed on a 15 Wisdom saving throw or take 2d4 Psychic damage.

name: Instrument of the Bards, Fochlucan Bandore
description: Requires attunement by by a bard. An Instrument of the Bards is superior to an ordinary instrument in every way. Seven types of these instruments exist, each named after a bard college. A creature that attempts to play the instrument without being attuned to it must succeed on a 15 Wisdom saving throw or take 2d4 Psychic damage.

name: Instrument of the Bards, Mac-Fuirmidh Cittern
description: Requires attunement by by a bard. An Instrument of the Bards is superior to an ordinary instrument in every way. Seven types of these instruments exist, each named after a bard college. A creature that attempts to play the instrument without being attuned to it must succeed on a 15 Wisdom saving throw or take 2d4 Psychic damage.

name: Keoghtom's Ointment
description: This glass jar, 3 inches in diameter, contains 1d4 + 1 doses of a thick mixture that smells faintly of aloe. The jar and its contents weigh 1/2 pound.

name: Lantern of Revealing
description: While lit, this hooded lantern burns for 6 hours on 1 pint of oil, shedding Bright Light in a 30-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 30 feet. Invisible creatures and objects are visible as long as they are in the lantern's Bright Light. You can take a Utilize action to lower the hood, reducing the lantern's light to Dim Light in a 5-foot radius.

name: Lock of Trickery
description: This lock appears to be an ordinary Lock (of the type described in chapter 6 of the Player's Handbook) and comes with a single key. The tumblers in this lock magically adjust to thwart burglars. Dexterity checks made to pick the lock have Disadvantage.

name: Medallion of Thoughts
description: Requires attunement. The medallion has 5 charges. While wearing it, you can expend 1 charge to cast Detect Thoughts (save 13) from it. The medallion regains 1d4 expended charges daily at dawn.

name: Mystery Key
description: A question mark is worked into the head of this key. The key has a 5 chance of unlocking any lock into which it's inserted. Once it unlocks something, the key disappears.

name: Nature's Mantle
description: Requires attunement by by a druid or ranger. This cloak shifts color and texture to blend with the terrain surrounding you. While wearing the cloak, you can use it as a Spellcasting Focus for your Druid and Ranger spells.

name: Necklace of Adaptation
description: Requires attunement. While wearing this necklace, you can breathe normally in any environment, and you have Advantage on saving throws made to avoid or end the Poisoned condition.

name: Orb of Direction
description: This orb can be used as an Arcane Focus.

name: Orb of Time
description: This orb can be used as an Arcane Focus.

name: Pearl of Power
description: Requires attunement by by a spellcaster. While this pearl is on your person, you can take a Magic action to regain one expended spell slot of level 3 or lower. Once you use the pearl, it can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Perfume of Bewitching
description: This tiny vial contains magic perfume, enough for one use. You can take a Magic action to apply the perfume to yourself, and its effect lasts 1 hour. For the duration, you have Advantage on all Charisma (Deception and Persuasion) checks made to influence a creature within 5 feet of yourself.

name: Periapt of Health
description: Requires attunement. While wearing this pendant, you can take a Magic action to regain 2d4 + 2 Hit Points. Once used, this property can't be used again until the next dawn.

name: Periapt of Wound Closure
description: Requires attunement. While wearing this pendant, you gain the following benefits.

name: Pipe of Smoke Monsters
description: While smoking this pipe, you can take a Magic action to exhale a puff of smoke that takes the form of a creature, such as a dragon, a flumph, or a slaad. The form must be small enough to fit in a 1-foot cube and loses its shape after a few seconds, becoming an ordinary puff of smoke.

name: Pipes of Haunting
description: These pipes have 3 charges and regain 1d3 expended charges daily at dawn. You can take a Magic action to play them and expend 1 charge to create an eerie, spellbinding tune. Each creature of your choice within 30 feet of you must succeed on a 15 Wisdom saving throw or have the Frightened condition for 1 minute. A creature that fails the save repeats it at the end of each of its turns, ending the effect on itself on a success. A creature that succeeds on its save is immune to the effect of these pipes for 24 hours.

name: Pipes of the Sewers
description: Requires attunement. While these pipes are on your person, ordinary rat and giant rat are Indifferent [Attitude] toward you and won't attack you unless you threaten or harm them.

name: Pole of Angling
description: This item functions as a Pole. While holding it, you can take a Magic action to cause it to transform into a fishing pole with a hook, a line, and a reel, or have the fishing pole revert to a Pole.

name: Pole of Collapsing
description: This item functions as a Pole. While holding it, you can take a Magic action to collapse it into a 1-foot-long rod for ease of storage (the pole's weight doesn't change) or cause the 1-foot-long rod to revert to a Pole. The rod elongates only as far as the surrounding space allows.

name: Pot of Awakening
description: If you plant an ordinary shrub in this 10-pound clay pot and let it grow for 30 days, the shrub magically transforms into an Awakened Shrub at the end of that time. When the shrub awakens, its roots break the pot, destroying it.

name: Prosthetic Limb
description: This magic item replaces a lost limb—a hand, an arm, a foot, a leg, or a similar body part. While the prosthetic is attached, it functions identically to the part it replaces. You can detach or reattach it as a Magic action, and it can't be removed against your will while you are alive.

name: Quaal's Feather Token, Anchor
description: This object looks like a feather.

name: Quaal's Feather Token, Fan
description: This object looks like a feather.

name: Quaal's Feather Token, Tree
description: This object looks like a feather.

name: Quiver of Ehlonna
description: Each of the quiver's three compartments connects to an extradimensional space that allows the quiver to hold numerous items while never weighing more than 2 pounds. The shortest compartment can hold up to 60 Arrow, Bolt, or similar objects. The midsize compartment holds up to 18 Javelin or similar objects. The longest compartment holds up to 6 long objects, such as bows, Quarterstaff, or Spear.

name: Rival Coin
description: This gold coin has a creature embossed on each side. The two depicted creatures must be famous rivals or enemies of each other. For example, a Rival Coin might show Iggwilv on one side and Mordenkainen on the other, or Venger on one side and Tiamat on the other. One of these figures is on the "heads" side of the coin, the other on the "tails" side.

name: Robe of Useful Items
description: This robe has cloth patches of various shapes and colors covering it. While wearing the robe, you can take a Magic action to detach one of the patches, causing it to become the object or creature it represents. Once the last patch is removed, the robe becomes an ordinary garment.

name: Rope of Climbing
description: This 60-foot length of rope can hold up to 3,000 pounds. While holding one end of the rope, you can take a Magic action to command the other end of the rope to animate and move toward a destination you choose, up to the rope's length away from you. That end moves 10 feet on your turn when you first command it and 10 feet at the start of each of your subsequent turns until reaching its destination or until you tell it to stop. You can also tell the rope to fasten itself securely to an object or to unfasten itself, to knot or unknot itself, or to coil itself for carrying.

name: Rope of Mending
description: This 50-foot coil of rope can repair itself when cut into any number of smaller pieces. As a Magic action, you can cause all pieces of the rope that are in contact with each other and not otherwise in use to knit back together. A Rope of Mending is forever shortened if a section of it is lost or destroyed.

name: Ruby of the War Mage
description: Requires attunement by by a spellcaster. Etched with eldritch runes, this 1-inch-diameter ruby allows you to use a Simple or Martial weapon as a Spellcasting Focus for your spells. For this property to work, you must attach the ruby to the weapon by pressing the ruby against it for at least 10 minutes. Thereafter, the ruby can't be removed unless you detach it as a Magic action, the weapon is destroyed, or your Attunement to the ruby ends.

name: Saddle of the Cavalier
description: While in this saddle on a mount, you can't be dismounted against your will if you're conscious, and attack rolls against the mount have disadvantage.

name: Sending Stones
description: Sending Stones come in pairs, with each stone carved to match the other so the pairing is easily recognized. While you touch one stone, you can cast Sending from it. The target is the bearer of the other stone. If no creature bears the other stone, you know that fact as soon as you use the stone, and you don't cast the spell.

name: Slippers of Spider Climbing
description: Requires attunement. While you wear these light shoes, you can move up, down, and across vertical surfaces and along ceilings, while leaving your hands free. You have a Climb Speed equal to your Speed. However, the slippers don't allow you to move this way on a slippery surface, such as one covered by ice or oil.

name: Stone of Good Luck
description: Requires attunement. While this polished agate is on your person, you gain a +1 bonus to ability checks and saving throws.

name: Talking Doll
description: Requires attunement. While this doll is within 5 feet of you, you can spend a Short Rest telling it to say up to six phrases, none of which can be more than six words long, and set a condition under which the doll speaks each phrase. You can also replace old phrases with new ones. Whatever the condition, it must occur within 5 feet of the doll to make it speak. For example, whenever someone picks up the doll, it might say, "I want a piece of candy." The doll's phrases are lost when your Attunement to the doll ends.

name: Tankard of Sobriety
description: This tankard has a stern face sculpted into one side. You can drink ale, wine, or any other nonmagical alcoholic beverage poured into it without becoming inebriated. The tankard has no effect on magical liquids or harmful substances such as poison.

name: Veteran's Cane
description: As a Bonus Action, you can transform this walking cane into an ordinary Longsword or change the Longsword back into a walking cane. In either case, you must be holding the item.

name: Wind Fan
description: While holding this fan, you can cast Gust of Wind (save 13) from it. Each subsequent time the fan is used before the next dawn, it has a cumulative 20 chance of not working; if the fan fails to work, it tears into useless, nonmagical tatters.

name: Winged Boots
description: Requires attunement. These boots have 4 charges and regain 1d4 expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing the boots, you can take a Magic action to expend 1 charge, gaining a Fly Speed of 30 feet for 1 hour. If you are flying when the duration expires, you descend at a rate of 30 feet per round until you land.
